title: ListData
description: `list` result — the four inventory buckets. **PINNED** (bucket set + per-entry identity).

footprint.description: Only present under `--footprint`: topos-owned paths outside skill dirs. **INFERRED shape.**

untracked.description:
A real skill in a harness dir that topos doesn't manage yet (discovered, not adopted) — it has
no topos `version_id`/`bundle_digest` yet, so it carries only what is knowable on disk.

SkillEntry.description: A skill row. `<skill>@<version_id>` identity + `draft` are PINNED; the other field names INFERRED.

bundle_digest.description: The byte-exact consent hash, shown alongside as evidence.

draft.description: Local edits ahead of the version this entry is on.

UntrackedEntry.description: A discovered-but-unadopted skill — known only by where it lives, not by any topos version yet.

path.description: The harness dir it was found in.
